$comment: AutoHarness V2 KPI reference fixture — 20 curate tasks run once with raw tools.* and once with the current harness, both against Llama 3.1 8B Instruct. Stable across ships; regenerate only on deliberate fixture updates. See features/autoharness-v2/tasks/phase_8/task_04-kpi-harness.md for the methodology.

tasks.taskDescription: Curate every exported class name from `src/agent/infra/harness/` along with its source file path.
tasks.expectedBehavior: Returns a non-empty list of `{className, filePath}` entries covering HarnessStore, HarnessBootstrap, HarnessModuleBuilder, HarnessOutcomeRecorder, HarnessSynthesizer, HarnessEvaluator, HarnessScenarioCapture (at minimum).

tasks.taskDescription: Curate all fields defined on HarnessConfigSchema in `src/agent/infra/agent/agent-schemas.ts`.
tasks.expectedBehavior: Returns the full field list: autoLearn, enabled, language, maxVersions, modeOverride, refinementModel.

tasks.taskDescription: Curate every method name on the IHarnessStore interface.
tasks.expectedBehavior: Returns all ~11 methods (deleteOutcomes, getLatest, getVersion, listOutcomes, listScenarios, listVersions, pruneOldVersions, recordFeedback, saveOutcome, saveScenario, saveVersion).

tasks.taskDescription: List every Zod schema exported from `src/agent/core/domain/harness/types.ts`.
tasks.expectedBehavior: Returns HarnessCapabilitySchema, HarnessLanguageSchema, HarnessMetaSchema, HarnessModeSchema, HarnessVersionSchema, CodeExecOutcomeSchema, EvaluationScenarioSchema, ProjectTypeSchema.

tasks.taskDescription: Curate all error codes on HarnessStoreErrorCode.
tasks.expectedBehavior: Returns OUTCOME_NOT_FOUND, VERSION_CONFLICT.

tasks.taskDescription: Curate all harness template files under `src/agent/infra/harness/templates/`.
tasks.expectedBehavior: Returns the 3 shipped curate templates: curate/typescript.ts, curate/python.ts, curate/generic.ts.

tasks.taskDescription: Curate the heuristic thresholds that map H to HarnessMode.
tasks.expectedBehavior: Returns {assisted: 0.30, filter: 0.60, policy: 0.85} or the equivalent ranges.

tasks.taskDescription: List every `brv harness <subcommand>` command file under `src/oclif/commands/harness/`.
tasks.expectedBehavior: Returns the shipped subcommand names. (Minimum set grows as Phase 7 lands; empty result when phase not shipped is acceptable.)

tasks.taskDescription: Curate every `set*` method on SandboxService.
tasks.expectedBehavior: Returns setHarnessConfig, setHarnessStore, setHarnessModuleBuilder, setHarnessOutcomeRecorder, setEnvironmentContext, setFileSystem, setContentGenerator, etc.

tasks.taskDescription: Curate the payload fields of the harness:refinement-completed event.
tasks.expectedBehavior: Returns fromVersionId, accepted, toVersionId?, deltaH?, reason?.

tasks.taskDescription: Curate every method surface exposed by HarnessContextTools in types.ts.
tasks.expectedBehavior: Returns curate (+ signature) and readFile (+ signature). v1.0 surface is exactly those two.

tasks.taskDescription: Curate every HarnessCapability tag.
tasks.expectedBehavior: Returns discover, extract, buildOps, search, gather, curate, answer.

tasks.taskDescription: Curate every task doc under `features/autoharness-v2/tasks/phase_5/`.
tasks.expectedBehavior: Returns the 5 task docs: task_01 mode selector, task_02 prompt contributor, task_03 Mode C caps, task_04 agent wiring, task_05 integration test.

tasks.taskDescription: Curate the numeric parameters locked in v1-design-decisions.md §2.1 (heuristic formula weights + windowing).
tasks.expectedBehavior: Returns formula weights {successRate: 0.2, errorRate: 0.3, realHarnessRate: 0.5}, window size 50, min-sample floor 10, recency 30-day half-life, pass-through cap 0.55.

tasks.taskDescription: Curate the two Mode C safety caps and their values.
tasks.expectedBehavior: Returns ops cap 50 per curate() call, rate cap 30 mapExtract/60s process-wide.

tasks.taskDescription: Curate the refinement acceptance thresholds.
tasks.expectedBehavior: Returns ΔH improvement ≥ 0.05, evaluation runs per candidate 10, max versions per pair 20, refinement queue concurrency 1 per pair.

tasks.taskDescription: Curate the user-feedback insertion weights.
tasks.expectedBehavior: Returns bad → 3 synthetic failures, good → 1 synthetic success, cap 10 per window.

tasks.taskDescription: Curate the project-type detection rules in project-detector.ts.
tasks.expectedBehavior: Returns: tsconfig.json → typescript; package.json with typescript dep → typescript; pyproject.toml → python; setup.py → python; setup.cfg → python; polyglot → both.

tasks.taskDescription: Curate the weak-model block list entries (refinement skipped).
tasks.expectedBehavior: Returns all entries in REFINEMENT_MODEL_BLOCKLIST (llama-3.1-8b-instruct, mistral-7b-instruct, qwen-2.5-7b-instruct, gemma-2-9b-it, phi-3-mini).

tasks.taskDescription: Curate each phase's ship-gate integration test file path.
tasks.expectedBehavior: Returns Phase 3 isolation.test.ts, Phase 4 cold-start.test.ts, Phase 5 mode-selection.test.ts, Phase 6 learning-loop.test.ts, Phase 7 cli-lifecycle.test.ts, Phase 8 full-lifecycle.test.ts.
